Name: Camouflage
Effect: Narrative discipline for hiding, disguise, and stealth choices.

Name: Hunting
Effect: No Meal is needed when instructed to eat, except in wasteland or desert.

Name: Tracking
Effect: Narrative discipline for paths, signs, and pursuit.

Name: Healing
Effect: Recover 1 END for each numbered section without combat, up to max.

Name: Weaponskill
Effect: +2 Combat Skill when using the chosen weapon type.

Name: Mindshield
Effect: Protects against Mindblast attacks and similar mindforce loss.

Name: Mindblast
Effect: +2 Combat Skill in combat unless the target is immune.

Name: Animal Kinship
Effect: Narrative discipline for dealing with animals.

Name: Mind Over Matter
Effect: Narrative discipline for moving small objects.
